title: Speakeasy Jazz Club
description: Join us at Hove’s home for Wednesday night jazz. Nestled above The Wick Inn on Holland Road, The Speakeasy offers that classic ‘New York Supper Club’ vibe — perfect for a relaxed evening of live music, drinks and dining. With individual seating, shared tables and intimate alcoves, and Thai food while soaking up hard-swinging jazz from trumpeter Chris Coull and his Quartet, joined each week by a special guest. May 6 –ALAN BARNES One of Britain’s most celebrated jazz musicians, fluent on alto, baritone and clarinet, for bebop from a true great. May 13 –MARK NIGHTINGALE The UK’s leading jazz trombonist; rich tone, dazzling technique for a golden-age Blue Note sound. May 20 –DAVE O’HIGGINS This multi-award-winning tenor saxophonist delivers a sound steeped in the spirit of jazz legends for a soulful, swinging night. May 27 –TONY KOFI A devoted disciple of Charlie Parker and major name in UK jazz, Tony brings his fiery alto sound to channel the spirit of Bird.

venue.name: The Wick Inn - Speakeasy
venue.address: 63 Western Rd, Brighton and Hove, Hove, East Sussex
